title: Good Bones Web Inc. — Edmonton Website Consulting
description: Good Bones Web Inc. builds vibrant, strategy-first websites and digital experiences for businesses in Edmonton, Alberta and beyond.
lede: We build vibrant, strategy-first websites that turn Edmonton businesses into web-wide competitors — no bloated templates, just solid bones.
about_intro: We believe every business deserves a website that works as hard as they do — solid code underneath, bold design on top, and a strategy behind every page.
about_body: Based in Edmonton, we build for local businesses with world-wide ambition. No bloated templates. No mystery plugins. Just fast, accessible, hand-coded sites built to last.
services_sub: From first concept to live launch — strategy, design, and code that actually gets your business results.
work_sub: Case studies and screenshots are available on request — these previews show the breadth of what we build.
cta_sub: Let's build something Edmonton-proud and world-ready.
contact_title: Ready for a site with good bones?
contact_intro: Tell us what you are working on. We will reply within one business day with ideas, questions, and next steps.
blog_teaser_sub: Ideas, updates, and practical advice for making your website work harder.

projects.title: Local Coffee Roasters
projects.description: Brand site, online menu, and local SEO for an Edmonton cafe.

projects.title: Northside Fitness
projects.description: High-energy booking site with class schedules and membership CTAs.

projects.title: Prairie Makers Market
projects.description: E-commerce refresh that doubled mobile conversions in 90 days.

testimonials.quote: Our old site looked homemade and hid the personality of our cafe. Good Bones rebuilt it in weeks. Now customers actually comment on how easy it is to find us and order online.
testimonials.name: Sarah Miller

testimonials.quote: Mobile class bookings doubled within the first month. They didn't just make it pretty — they thought through the whole member experience, from signup to checkout.
testimonials.name: James Chen

testimonials.quote: We inherited a slow, broken shop that was costing us sales. Good Bones diagnosed the issues fast, fixed the critical stuff, and gave us a plan we could actually maintain.
testimonials.name: Asha Rahman
